Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}Attention, all students in the dormitory. The cafeteria will be closing in thirty minutes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Oh, there you are! We went to your room to look for you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}Oh, sorry, um... I don't think I'm going today. It'll be crowded anyway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Wait, is that your stuff? Have you not even been to your room since we got back?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Really? So you've just been spacing out here for hours?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Is... something going on?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Oh, no, I'm fine. It's nothing important.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 3 25 25}Just kinda hard to believe it's been, what, four years since I got here?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Oh yeah, I know what you mean. It is kinda depressing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Like, why do we have to stay cooped up in a dorm for what should be the best three years of our lives?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}And our first year's almost done! High school will be over before we get to have any fun...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Well, try not to let it bother you too much. We'll get through it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Stupid... Of course I wouldn't find out anything about Dad just by going to school...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}If even the police and the media haven't found anything new...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 10 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}Maybe I'd be better off giving up...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 5 21 0 4}Excuse me. You're Takeba-san, yes? The first-year?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}{f 5 21 0 4}Oh, good. I'm glad I found you. There's a letter for you.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 5 21 0 4}It actually came yesterday. I'm sorry for the late delivery.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}{f 5 21 0 4}Honestly, it took me a while to make out who it was addressed to.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}{f 5 21 0 4}It's from an Eiichiro Takeba. Is he a relative?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 4 25 25}"Commemorating the opening of the Moonlight Bridge"... This is from ten years ago...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 5 21 0 4}Wh— Takeba-san, wait! I need your signature![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 5 21 0 4}And you left all your things here! Takeba-san![n]{f 1 1}
